home.title: Taskery — freelance marketplace for clients and freelancers
home.description: Publish projects and find freelancers in Ukraine, Poland and Europe. Escrow deals, ratings, chat and TaskBoost. Payments in UAH, PLN and EUR. 10% commission.

about.description: Taskery is a modern freelance marketplace with escrow deals, ratings and tools for clients and freelancers in Ukraine, Poland and Europe.

hero.description: Taskery connects clients and freelancers with escrow deals, ratings, chat and PRO tools. Pay in ₴, zł and €. Safer than working off-platform.

features.title: Escrow deals
features.text: Funds are reserved until the work is accepted.

clients.title: Post a project with a result guarantee
benefits: With escrow you pay only after accepting the work — funds stay safe until the end.
Platform support helps resolve disputes between both sides.
Budget, deadlines and chat are kept in one place — no messenger chaos.

howItWorks.title: From idea to payment — four simple steps
howItWorks.description: Taskery guides clients and freelancers through a clear process: from posting a task to a secure payout.

steps.title: Publish a project
steps.text: Describe the task, set a budget and deadline. The project appears in the freelancer catalog.

steps.title: Choose a freelancer
steps.text: Compare proposals, portfolios and ratings. Discuss details in chat before work starts.

steps.title: Open an escrow deal
steps.text: Funds are reserved on the platform. The freelancer starts work with payment confidence.

steps.title: Accept the result
steps.text: Review the work and confirm completion — funds are released to the freelancer automatically.

safety.title: A safe service for freelancers and clients
safety.description: Taskery builds deals around escrow: funds under platform control, transparent rules and support for both sides at every stage.
clientsPoints: Payment goes to the freelancer only after work is accepted.
In a dispute, funds stay in escrow until the platform decides.
All chat history and deal terms are stored in the system.
freelancersPoints: Funds are reserved before start — you are protected from non-payment.
Clear project stages and a fixed budget in the contract.
Taskery arbitration helps resolve disputes fairly.

verified.title: Choose verified contractors
verified.description: Compare freelancers by reputation, not price alone. Taskery shows real reviews, portfolios and experience — so you find a reliable specialist the first time.
benefits: Ratings and reviews come from real completed deals on the platform.
Profiles show skills, portfolios and project history — not just promises.

freelancers.title: Why freelancers choose Taskery
freelancers.description: The platform is built for freelancers: transparent deals, payment protection and tools to grow remote income.

reasons.title: Payment guarantee
reasons.text: Escrow reserves the budget before start — you work knowing funds are already on the platform.

reasons.title: Project flow
reasons.text: The project catalog with budget and deadline is updated 24/7 — apply to matching tasks.

reasons.title: Reputation growth
reasons.text: Reviews and ratings after each deal help you get more invitations from clients.

reasons.title: TaskBoost
reasons.text: Profile promotion, search priority and a PRO badge — for those who want more projects.

about.intro: Taskery is a next-generation freelance marketplace connecting clients and freelancers with transparent terms, escrow deals and reviews.
about.clientsText: Publish projects, receive bids from freelancers, choose a contractor and control quality through escrow. Funds are released only after you accept the work.
about.freelancersText: Build a profile with portfolio and skills, apply to projects and get paid to your balance. PRO boosts visibility in the directory.
about.securityText: Escrow protects both sides. In disputes, an administrator can arbitrate. Project chat is saved in your account.

footer.tagline: Freelance marketplace with escrow deals, payments in ₴, zł and € and PRO promotion.

faq.question: What is Taskery?
faq.answer: Taskery is a freelance marketplace for clients and freelancers in Ukraine, Poland and Europe. Clients publish projects, freelancers apply, and the platform provides secure deals through escrow and a review system.

faq.question: Which currencies are supported?
faq.answer: The platform supports hryvnia (UAH), Polish zloty (PLN) and euro (EUR). The currency is set when creating a project and used in escrow deals.

faq.question: How does escrow work?
faq.answer: When you choose a freelancer, the deal amount is reserved on the client's balance. After work is accepted, funds are transferred to the freelancer minus the platform commission. In a dispute, an admin makes a decision.

faq.question: What is the platform commission?
faq.answer: The standard commission is 10% of the deal amount. It is deducted when the deal is completed from the total: the client pays the full price, the freelancer receives the amount minus commission.

faq.question: What does the PRO subscription include?
faq.answer: TaskBoost for freelancers: PRO badge, catalog priority, highlighted profile and unlimited proposals. Clients have no subscription — publishing projects and deals is free.

faq.question: How do I top up my balance?
faq.answer: Clients top up via Stripe (card). Funds are used to pay freelancers in the project's currency.

faq.question: Can I work with a freelancer off-platform?
faq.answer: We recommend completing deals through Taskery — you are protected by escrow, chat history and arbitration. Off-platform work removes these guarantees.

externalLeave.metaDescription: Taskery safety screen before opening an external website.
externalLeave.title: You are leaving Taskery's protected zone
externalLeave.subtitle: This link leads to an external website. We do not control third-party resources and cannot guarantee their safety. Make sure you trust the address and the person who sent the link.
externalLeave.remember: I understand the risks — don't show this warning for 30 days
tips: Check the domain carefully — scammers often change one or two letters.
Never enter your Taskery password on external websites.
Do not download password-protected files from strangers.
Keep agreements and deliverables in Taskery chat under escrow protection.

faq.question: How is TaskBoost different from the free plan?
faq.answer: TaskBoost adds profile promotion, a premium badge, and catalog priority. Basic deals and escrow are available to everyone.

faq.question: How do I get TaskBoost for free?
faq.answer: Freelancers receive 20 days of promotion when they sign up. Another 10 days are added when you fill out your portfolio — add at least one work sample.

faq.question: Can I buy a subscription?
faq.answer: Paid TaskBoost subscription is coming later. For now, promotion is free under the conditions above.

faq.question: Is TaskBoost for clients?
faq.answer: TaskBoost is for freelancers only. Clients use the platform for free — a 10% commission is taken from the deal amount when it completes.

sections.heading: 1. General terms
sections.body: By using Taskery, you agree to these terms. If you disagree, do not use the platform.

sections.heading: 2. Account and security
sections.body: You are responsible for account credentials and activity under your account.

sections.heading: 3. Deals and payments
sections.body: Taskery provides escrow tools and Stripe processing. Fees are shown in the UI before deal confirmation.

sections.heading: 1. Data we collect
sections.body: We process profile, transaction, messaging, and technical data needed to operate the platform.

sections.heading: 2. Why we use data
sections.body: Data is used to provide the service, secure accounts, process payments, and comply with legal obligations.

sections.heading: 3. Your rights
sections.body: You may request access, correction, or deletion of your personal data under applicable law.
